narrative: Boston Fed’s Collins raises prospect of rate hikes as US inflation broadens — USD/JPY holds at 157.92, supported by 300bp Fed-BoJ carry; options market diverges with strong put skew at -1.62 (25d RR). AUD/JPY bilateral divergence dominates G8 themes (spread 1.482%) as AUD leads (+0.849%) and JPY lags (-0.633%); gold lower -0.18%; equities +0.58%; DXY -0.04%; VIX 17.9. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27.
